name: SimpleLogin

pricing.details: Free tier: 15 aliases. Premium $30/year with unlimited aliases, custom domains, and directory.

description: Email alias service that creates forwarding addresses, protecting the user's real email address from third-party services and enabling per-service alias management.
rationale: SimpleLogin provides a practical mechanism for email address compartmentalization. Each alias is independently revocable, limiting data broker and spam exposure. The service is open source and self-hostable. Acquired by Proton AG in 2022, sharing infrastructure governance. PGP encryption of forwarded messages is supported. The tool addresses a different threat model than a standalone email provider — it is most effective when used alongside a private email provider.
